Fig1.dat
Columns: T,P/T^4,LWF part,M_q,M_g

Columns: tau,m_1(r=0.224fm)(upper),m_1(r=0.224fm)(central),m_1(r=0.224fm)(lower),m_1(r=0.505fm)(upper),m_1(r=0.505fm)(central),m_1(r=0.505fm)(lower),m_1(r=0.757fm)(upper),m_1(r=0.757fm)(central),m_1(r=0.757fm)(lower)
